a:r.a:t: Simulate flood in Pune with 150mm rainfall
User enters natural language query specifying location and scenario
Interactive visualization showing risk zones with color-coded intensity levels
High flood risk detected in Koregaon Park and Kalyani Nagar areas...
1. Deploy emergency teams 2. Evacuate low-lying areas...
Context-aware recommendations based on retrieved policies
One-click PDF generation for stakeholder sharing
